notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Kyle Manzardo batting, Chase DeLauter picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, first baseman Jacob Gonzalez.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Colson Montgomery reaches on a fielding error by left fielder Cooper Ingle. Andrew Benintendi to 3rd. Colson Montgomery to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: David Fry pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: David Fry homers (6) on a fly ball to left field.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Chase Meidroth reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Gabriel Arias. Chase Meidroth to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Chase Meidroth reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Gabriel Arias. Chase Meidroth to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Brayan Rocchio walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Brayan Rocchio homers (6) on a fly ball to right field. Daniel Schneemann scores.

notableEvents.label: Colson Montgomery reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Colson Montgomery reaches on a fielding error by left fielder Cooper Ingle. Andrew Benintendi to 3rd. Colson Montgomery to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Chase Meidroth reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Chase Meidroth reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Gabriel Arias. Chase Meidroth to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Randal Grichuk pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Randal Grichuk flies out sharply to center fielder Steven Kwan.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Brayan Rocchio homers (6) on a fly ball to right field. Daniel Schneemann scores.
